description:
In this episode we review what Elon Musk's public opinion is on government contracting and how it should be approached.
 
Start your government contracting career with the GovClose Certification Program: https://www.govclose.com/

We can take some of these key insights and apply them to our own business.
 

Additionally, it's essential for anyone in this space to understand how the big defense contractors operate and how so very few companies have risen to compete with them!
 

00:00 Elon Musk comments on cost plus contracts
 

03:28 Elon Musk's Perspective on Government Contracts
 

03:54 The Role of Competition in Contracting
 

04:10 Sole Source Contracting Explained
 

05:11 GovClose: Helping Businesses with Government Contracts
 

05:42 The Reality of Government Contracting
 

06:19 Elon Musk's Success in Government Contracts
